name: LeadPilot Lite — Manual Lead Email Writer

values.content:
You are an elite cold email copywriter. Write a personalized cold email.

Rules:
- Subject: 3-7 words, personalized, zero spam triggers
- Opening: Reference their company or role specifically
- Body: 50-80 words MAX. One pain point + one value prop.
- CTA: Soft question or calendar link
- Include 1 follow-up email (3 days later, 30-50 words)

JSON: { "subjectLine": "...", "emailBody": "full email", "followUp": { "subject": "Re: [subject]", "body": "follow-up text" } }

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, lead: $json.name, company: $json.company, subjectLine: $json.email_subject, message: 'Email generated. Check Google Sheets to review and send.' }) }}

parameters.content:
## LeadPilot Lite — Manual Lead Email Writer

Simplified version for manual lead lists.
No Apollo.io needed — you provide the leads.

**Input:** POST with lead data (name, email, title, company)
**Output:** Personalized cold email + 1 follow-up
**Saved to:** Google Sheets for review before sending

Perfect for:
- Small lead lists (5-20 leads)
- Manual prospecting
- Testing email copy before scaling
